name: Registry Persistence Mechanisms Detected
description: Detection of a process attempting to establish persistence via common registry run keys or startup folders. Adversaries may modify registry keys to maintain execution or as a persistence mechanism. This detection is based on the behavioral analysis of a process writing to a known persistence registry key, which could indicate a malicious attempt to ensure that the code is executed every time a system restarts or a user logs on. This prompt helps investigate the source of the persistence attempt and determine if it's a legitimate system behavior or a malicious one.

prompts.prompt: Investigate the registry persistence attempt at `{timestamp}` on host `{hostname}`. The process `{process_name}` with Process ID `{process_id}` attempted to write to the registry key `{registry_key}`. Analyze the command line (`{command_line}`) for any suspicious arguments and review the user (`{user_name}`) associated with the activity. Determine if this is a legitimate system behavior or a malicious attempt to establish persistence. Provide a summary of your findings and recommend immediate mitigation steps.

parameters.name: hostname
parameters.description: The hostname where the registry persistence attempt was detected.

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process involved in the registry persistence attempt.

parameters.name: process_id
parameters.description: The Process ID of the process involved in the registry persistence attempt.

parameters.name: registry_key
parameters.description: The registry key that was written to.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line of the process involved in the registry persistence attempt.

parameters.name: user_name
parameters.description: The user account under which the process was executed.
